story.info: Woof! I'm Goodboi. Part of my daily patrol isn't connecting today. A few of my usual routes are blocked. Let's fix that!
story.headline: Tutorial Patrol
story.summary: Sniff… something's off. A few roads aren't lining up the way they should. Tap a tile and turn it until the path fits.

clues.text: There we go. Turn the roads until they connect all the way through.
That's it. When a place connects, the road lights up. That means I can get through.
Nice! Some paths bend. Some go straight. Rotate them until the lines meet cleanly.
Good. Keep turning the pieces until the road reaches the exit cleanly.
Keep going! Line it up so everything flows.
Almost there. Make sure every stop has a clear path.
Yes! Every road's connected and my patrol's wide open again. Let's keep moving.
